name: Mint Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the mint chocolate chips with whipping cream and butter in a heavy, medium saucepan over low heat, stirring occasionally.
2. Pour the mixture into a pie pan.
3. Refrigerate until the mixture is fudgy but soft, about 2 hours.
4. Shape about 1 tablespoon of the mixture into 1 ¼ inch balls.
5. Roll the balls in your palms to shape them.
6. Place the balls on waxed paper.
7. Roll each ball in chocolate sprinkles.
8. Place the coated truffles in petit four or candy cases.
9. If the coating doesn't stick because the truffle has set, roll between your palms until the outside is soft.
10. Store refrigerated for up to 2-3 days or frozen for several weeks.
